hero.title: Experience Hair Artistry. Your Look.
hero.subtext: Step into our chic industrial sanctuary, where modern artistry meets timeless elegance. In the heart of Seattle, we don't just cut hair—we curate confidence, one personalized style at a time.

nicheCopy.aboutHeading: Our Vision: The Art of Sanctuary & Style
nicheCopy.aboutBody: Emerald City Cuts was born from a vision: to create a salon that felt less like a transaction and more like a retreat. Nestled in the heart of Seattle, our sun-drenched industrial loft is a testament to curated contrasts—where the strength of polished concrete and exposed beams meets the gentle warmth of caramel leather and soft, dusty rose accents. We believe a haircut is a ritual of self-expression. It’s a collaborative conversation, a moment of stillness in a bustling city. Our stylists are not just technicians; they are artists dedicated to understanding your unique essence and translating it into a style that feels effortlessly you. Step inside, take a breath, and let us craft a look that empowers you to walk back into the world feeling renewed, confident, and utterly authentic.
nicheCopy.serviceIntro: Our services are tailored rituals, designed to enhance your natural beauty and fit seamlessly into your life.

testimonials.name: Jessica L.
testimonials.text: I've been searching for a salon in Seattle that 'gets it,' and I've finally found it. The space is stunning—like a chic, cozy loft. My stylist truly listened and gave me the most beautiful, low-maintenance balayage. I walked out feeling like a new person.

testimonials.name: Amanda S.
testimonials.text: This is hands-down the best haircut I've ever had. The attention to detail was incredible. They took the time to understand my hair type and lifestyle, creating a cut that air-dries perfectly—a must for drizzly Seattle mornings! The ambiance is the cherry on top.

testimonials.name: David R.
testimonials.text: As a professional, I need a sharp, modern cut, but I also value a relaxing experience. Emerald City Cuts delivers on both. The environment is sophisticated yet comfortable, and the stylists are true artists. I always leave feeling polished and confident. The best in the city.
